calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jeffrey Marguiles, II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff New California Land Company.
Carolyn Infante, Partner in New California Land Company, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Destiny Rhodes, sued as Dee Romeo.

Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 29, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following Exhibits:

Exhibit 1--Residential Lease Agreement, dated 11/21/91-------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 1--Three (3) Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit, dated February 9, 2009----------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff New California Land Company, and against defendant Destiny Rhodes, sued as Dee Romeo as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,243.00.
Holdover Damages - $6,164.11.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.
Total - $8,407.11.

Additionally, plaintiff New California Land Company is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 635 Ashbury, #2, San Francisco, CA 94117. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel for plaintiff stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Counsel shall submitted a proposed judgment to the Court no later than August 20, 2009.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JEFFREY E. MARGULIES APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, WHO IS PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR DUE TO NON APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. TRIAL DATE REMAINS. JURY TRIAL IS NOT STRICKEN.

COMMISSIONER WILLIAM GARGANO, CLERK LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (218).

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey Margulies, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: New California Land Company
Dee Romeo, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona

HEARING HELD on Plaintiff New California Land Company's Motion To Have Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted. - No responses, Request for Admissions deemed Admitted. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (Hearing was continued from 10:30am to 3pm, Dept. #612)

Notice Of Motion To Commpel Defts' Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Requests For Admission, Special Interrogatories, To Provide Further Responses To Pltf'S Demand For Production Of Documents, Set One, And To Grant Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar May-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeffrey Evan Margulies, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: New California Land Company
No other appearances.

After hearing, Plaintiff New California Land Company's Motion To Compel Defendants' Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Requests For Admissions; Special Interrogatories; To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiff's Demand For Production Of Documents, Set One; And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED as to form and special interrogatories - defendant to respond within 5 days. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dee Romeo aka Destiny Rhodes (no phone number given) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. There being no notice of intent to argue given, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DESTINY RHODES' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is denied. Five days to respond to the complaint. Plaintiff's evidence shows personal service. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189
